whyPaikari.heading: Why choose Paikari?
whyPaikari.subheading: We've built trust with transparent, secure trading.
whyPaikari.qcCopy: Every product passes rigorous quality checks before auction.
whyPaikari.qcDetail: Our certified inspectors grade each lot for freshness, weight, and purity. Only verified produce reaches the bidding floor — protecting buyers from substandard goods.
whyPaikari.pricingCopy: Real-time market rates with fully transparent bidding.
whyPaikari.pricingDetail: Every bid is broadcast live to all participants. No hidden premiums, no post-auction price changes. You always know exactly what you're paying and why.
whyPaikari.logisticsCopy: End-to-end delivery with real-time tracking and insurance.
whyPaikari.logisticsDetail: From farm to warehouse, we coordinate pickups, cold-chain storage, and last-mile delivery across 18 hubs. Every shipment is insured and GPS-tracked.
whyPaikari.paymentCopy: Escrow-based wallet system — funds held until delivery confirmed.
whyPaikari.paymentDetail: Buyer funds are locked in escrow at bid time and released to the seller only after delivery confirmation. Both parties are protected at every step.
